blocks.content: In this section, you'll navigate to the Connections page and search for the PostgreSQL integration.
Click **Connections**.
Click **Add new connection**.
Search for **PostgreSQL**.
Select the **PostgreSQL** tile.
Select your operating system and architecture to get the correct installation instructions.
Select your operating system.
Select your architecture.
Install Grafana Alloy to collect PostgreSQL metrics and forward them to Grafana Cloud.
In the **Install Alloy** section, click **Run Grafana Alloy**.

Perform one of the following:

| If you want to | Then |
| --- | --- |
| Create a new token | Click **Create new token**, enter a meaningful token name (e.g., `postgres-alloy`), then click **Create token**. |
| Use an existing token | Click **Use an existing token** and enter a token you have created in the past. |
Verify that the **Enable Remote Configuration** toggle is set to on.
In the **Install and run Grafana Alloy** section, click **Copy to Clipboard**.

Log into the machine where you are installing Grafana Alloy, open the Terminal, and paste the contents of the clipboard. Press **Enter** to install Grafana Alloy.

When the installation is complete, you'll see `Alloy is now running!`

To verify that Grafana Alloy is installed correctly, click **Test Alloy connection**.

If Grafana Alloy is installed correctly, you'll see `Awesome! Grafana Alloy is good to go`.
If Alloy is successfully installed, click **Proceed to install integration**.

Configure Grafana Alloy to collect PostgreSQL metrics and send them to Grafana Cloud.

To configure Alloy for PostgreSQL monitoring:
Review the **Check prerequisites specific to the PostgreSQL integration** section and verify your PostgreSQL instance meets the requirements.
Scroll to the **Set up Grafana Alloy to use the PostgreSQL integration** section and click **Copy to clipboard**.
Click **Copy to clipboard**.
Open the Grafana Alloy configuration file on your system, paste the configuration snippet, and save the file.
Scroll down to the **Restart Grafana Alloy** section.
Click **Copy to clipboard** to copy the restart command.
Run the restart command on your Alloy machine.
After restarting Alloy, test the connection.
Click **Test connection** to verify the PostgreSQL integration.
If successful, you'll see a confirmation message. You have successfully configured PostgreSQL monitoring with Grafana Alloy.
